chinese_news.title: 硬氪首发|moody前高管搭档大疆骨干入局陪伴机器人，锦秋领投，融资数千万
chinese_news.summary:
硬氪获悉，AI-Native科技潮玩品牌ZuzuZoos查无此园（杭州多蓝艾梦智能科技旗下）近日完成数千万元Pre-A轮融资，锦秋领投、上海复容跟投。此次融资将主要AI大模型迭代、硬件产品扩建、IP生态深化、全球市场拓展、核心团队扩容。

ZuzuZoos成立于2025年，聚焦“AI陪伴机器人+AI潮玩”。创始人董晓楠是前摩根士丹利投资银行分析师，曾任新消费独角兽企业moody事业部总经理，任职期间拉动GMV从2亿元增长至10亿元。硬件负责人是前大疆清扫机器人机械结构负责人，深耕机器人及智能硬件领域15余年，主导多款机器人研发与落地。IP设计团队来自泡泡玛特、迪士尼等IP大厂，AI团队来自智谱等头部大模型公司。

当下，陪伴机器人赛道已经涌入大量玩家，许多公司追求“更聪明”，董晓楠表示，ZuzuZoos更在意如何让AI角色真正为用户提供情绪体验，于是选择了一条差异化路径：不只是把AI机器人做成“会聊天的电子宠物”，而是尝试把AI、潮玩与IP世界观结合，创造一个有“活人感”和持续生命力的硅基伙伴。

“潮玩的底色本就带有反叛精神，消费

chinese_news.title: 安踏发布“折纸科技”，试图从结构设计寻找跑鞋缓震新方向
chinese_news.summary:
36氪获悉，6月16日，安踏在上海创新创意设计研究院发布全新跑鞋技术平台“折纸科技（ANTA FOLD）”，并同步推出首款搭载该技术的跑鞋产品折纸H1。

过去十余年，运动鞋行业的创新主要围绕材料展开。从EVA、TPU到Pebax等高性能发泡材料，各大品牌持续通过中底材料升级提升缓震与回弹表现。近年来，随着材料性能逐渐接近瓶颈，越来越多品牌开始将研发重点延伸至结构设计领域，希望通过几何构型优化进一步释放性能空间。

安踏此次推出的“折纸科技”，正是这一趋势下的最新尝试。

根据安踏介绍，该项目由安踏创新实验室联合牛津大学、天津大学及浙江大学相关研究团队共同研发。与传统依赖材料软硬度实现缓震不同，折纸科技试图利用特定折叠结构实现受力形变与能量管理，从而构建一套新的中底缓震方案。

其核心思路源于折纸工程学（Origami Engineering）。

作为一门融合数学、材料学与结构力学的交叉学科，折纸工程近年来已被广泛应用于航空航天、机器人、医疗器械等领域。通过特定的折叠几何结构，材料能够在有限空间内实

chinese_news.title: 科氪 | 两轮电动车没有天花板，爱玛黑翼要用AI与硬核科技赢得年轻男性的心
chinese_news.summary: 国内两轮电动车市场正悄然迎来一场深层次的“基因突变”。长期以来，大众对两轮电动车的认知被牢牢框定在“代步工具”与“大众精品”的传统叙事里。然而，在四川省体育馆的一场发布会上，爱玛正式发布了旗下专为年轻男性打造的极速运动品类品牌——“爱玛黑翼”（AIMA BLACK WING）。首位中国F1车手周冠宇化身“全速领航员”在线助力，爱玛黑翼S360电竞版、爱玛黑翼S360赛道版以及爱玛黑翼S790赛博版三款硬核新品集结亮相。这场动作透露出的创投信号再明显不过：在女性和基础通勤赛道筑牢绝对壁垒后，传统头部巨头爱玛正以一种颠覆性的姿态，正式向年轻男性性能与运动电摩赛道发起总攻。36氪通过与爱玛科技集团三位核心高管的深度专访，试图拆解两轮电动车从功能代步全面迈向体验升级的下半场逻辑，看他们如何锚定Z世代的硬核社交货币，打破行业所谓的“天花板”。

chinese_news.title: 科氪 | 纯粹热爱的城市探索玩家而来 ，爱玛黑翼三大新车集结亮相
chinese_news.summary:
6月17日，爱玛黑翼品牌战略发布会在四川省体育馆盛大开启。体育馆化身爱玛黑翼玩家街区，潮流青年齐聚现场。爱玛黑翼以“全速热爱”为品牌主张，携爱玛黑翼S360电竞版、爱玛黑翼S360赛道版、爱玛黑翼S790赛博版三款车型重磅亮相，首位中国F1车手周冠宇以爱玛黑翼“全速领航员”身份在线助力品牌发布。爱玛黑翼的登场，标志着爱玛电动车在男性出行科技领域树立起全新坐标，正式构建起“他硬核”增长格局，向“时尚科技年轻品牌”全速进阶。

chinese_news.title: 氪星晚报｜BilibiliWorld 2026成国内首个海外售票的综合性ACG展会；让AI走进千家万户，17项举措推进“人工智能+消费”发展；快舟十一号遥十三运载火箭发射成功
chinese_news.summary:
大公司：

滴滴自动驾驶参加伦敦MOVE 2026大会

6月17至18日，MOVE 2026大会在英国伦敦召开，滴滴自动驾驶在会上分享了来自中国的自动驾驶落地实践。在AI技术方面，滴滴自动驾驶已实现L4级全栈核心技术的自主可控；硬件方面，与广汽埃安联合打造的新一代Robotaxi车型R2已于今年1月交付，正持续在广州和北京等地开展道路测试；在场景应用上，自去年四季度在广州、北京部分示范应用区域开启全天候载客测试以来，滴滴自动驾驶始终保持安全稳定的运行表现。

chinese_news.title: 蔚来补上“智驾课”，任少卿总结：智驾技术创新将重构竞争
chinese_news.summary:
文｜肖漫
编辑｜李勤

6月18日，蔚来同时向两代平台车型（包含8款NT2.0平台车型、4款NT2.5平台车型，以及6款NT3.0车型）推送了最新版的世界模型，这意味着，蔚来现在能让同一套复杂的智驾代码，现在能跑在不同代际的芯片上。

软件迭代节奏被硬件绑架曾是一个困扰行业的难题。很多车企无法在不同版本、配置的车型上迭代同一款软件，这带来的结果是，很长时间内只有使用最新版本硬件的车才能用上最好的软件，老车主被背刺。

蔚来部署推理跨平台兼容

chinese_news.title: 中国游戏的错位竞争：头部赌3A，腰部吃存量 | 游戏风向标
chinese_news.summary:
文丨小葵

编辑丨果脯

中国游戏产业正站在一个微妙的分水岭上。

一边，腾讯网易等头部大厂利用资本，以全球资源整合或漫长自研周期，向代表行业塔尖的3A单机游戏发起冲锋；另一边，以4399百奥为代表的腰部力量，在各自深耕的细分赛道里，通过成熟玩法复刻与精细化运营，稳守利润阵地。

今年夏日游戏节的发布会上，数十家全球顶尖游戏厂商轮番登台，发布了超过50款新作的最新消息。

在海外大厂普遍打出“老IP重制+续作”保守牌局中，腾讯和网易同时拿出3A级的单机产品，并肩出现在全球顶级展会的聚光灯下。

当大厂渴望用3A讲述中国故事建立全球品牌壁垒，腰部厂商则在存量市场中持续收割，一个向上押注3A，一个向下蚕食存量。这两条看似背道而驰的路，正共用着同一个起点。

01

本次SGF上，腾讯拿出《穿越火线：潜伏》与《古剑》堪称两张风格迥异的牌。

chinese_news.title: 12306要忙着赚钱了
chinese_news.summary:
作者 | 王晗玉

编辑 | 张帆

近日，市场监管总局联合中央网信办、国家铁路局，依法约谈携程、同程、去哪儿、飞猪、美团、智行火车票、高铁管家7家旅游出行第三方平台，直指平台在火车票销售领域存在多项不规范经营行为。

具体来看，违规行为包括不当宣传“候补帮抢”及付费选座、不当诱导用户“买长乘短”“买短乘长”，不当收集、使用用户个人信息等问题。后续监管部门将加大监管执法力度。

此次集中约谈，不仅直指OTA平台火车票业务的乱象根源，也揭开了在线旅游行业围绕出行流量展开的深层博弈。

监管收紧的背景下，传统OTA依赖的流量逻辑正在动摇，而铁路官方平台跨界拓展酒旅业务的可能性，也让整个在线出行行业迎来新一轮变数。

抢票“加速包”，OTA的“流量加速包”

每逢各大、小长假，打开OTA平台的火车票页面，“极速抢票”“候补加速”“高成功率帮抢”等标语便铺天盖地，甚至

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will Bitcoin close above $68,000 by end of June 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: BTC down 4 straight days amid STRC leverage liquidations and memory crisis pressuring tech valuations; $13B options expiry in June creates pin risk.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CoinDesk live markets, Cointelegraph $13B Bitcoin options expiry analysis

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will SpaceX maintain $1 trillion+ valuation through Q3 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Historic IPO debut at $135/share triggered record leveraged ETF demand, but market typically reprices post-IPO hype within 90 days.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CNBC SpaceX IPO coverage (37% first-week rally, trillion-dollar valuation)

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will the Fed hold rates steady at June 2026 FOMC meeting?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Oil tanker traffic surge from U.S.-Iran deal normalizing geopolitics reduces inflation surprise risk; Strait of Hormuz toll-free period stability matters for energy prices.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CNBC U.S.-Iran Strait of Hormuz deal, toll structure uncertainty

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will NVIDIA stock outperform S&P 500 by >10% through end of 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Memory shortage hitting even Apple forcing price increases; NVIDIA's dominant VRAM supply position should benefit from sustained demand and margin expansion.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CNBC Apple memory crisis, Tim Cook 'unsustainable' shortage statement

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will Charles Schwab's prediction market offering achieve >$1B notional volume within 6 months of launch?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Schwab entering prediction markets with S&P 500 event options signals institutional mainstream adoption; retail access to prediction markets accelerating.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CoinDesk and Cointelegraph Schwab prediction markets entry announcement (WSJ reporting)

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Apple's memory costs exceed 15% of gross margin by Q4 2026 due to shortage?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: Apple quarterly earnings call and 10-Q filings (gross margin and cost of revenue breakdowns)
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Market hasn't priced in the structural shift; CEO Tim Cook called shortage 'unsustainable,' signaling willingness to absorb costs rather than raise prices materially, implying margin compression.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CNBC Apple memory shortage, CEO Tim Cook 'unsustainable' statement; investors focusing on pricing power miss cost structure risk

market_questions_to_create.question: Will the Strait of Hormuz toll system become operational and charge shipping fees by December 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: U.S. State Department press releases, IAEA shipping reports, tanker tracking (Vessel Finder, Refinitiv Eikon)
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Current market pricing assumes U.S.-Iran deal stability; toll-free period ends but toll implementation faces political/operational hurdles—market discounts execution risk.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CNBC reporting questions about 'how the Strait of Hormuz will be governed after the toll-free period ends'; Israel-Hezbollah ceasefire reduces Middle East instability, lowering conflict premium

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Bitcoin's 30-day realized volatility exceed 80% annualized at any point in June 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: CoinGecko or Glassnode 30-day realized volatility metric
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: $13B Bitcoin options expiry creates gamma squeeze risk; leverage liquidations (STRC, digital credit) unwind unpredictably; most traders expect vol compression post-expiry rather than expansion.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CoinDesk coverage of $13B June expiry, digital credit market selloff, Saylor commentary on STRC leverage; Cointelegraph bear sentiment in options market

market_questions_to_create.question: Will ETH/BTC ratio fall below 0.045 by August 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: CoinMarketCap or Kraken ETH/BTC spot price ratio
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: DeFi and smart-contract coins leading losses; if Bitcoin stabilizes above $68k and ETH-heavy leverage unwinds, ratio compression likely but not priced into altcoin synthetics.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CoinDesk 'smart-contract and DeFi coins lead losses' headline; digital credit collapse signals forced rebalancing away from high-beta assets

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Franklin Templeton's dividend-to-Bitcoin ETF (announced May 2026) accumulate >$500M AUM by June 2027?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: Franklin Templeton SEC filings (N-PX, fact sheets), ETF.com, or Morningstar fund database
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Novel product category (RWA-style dividend monetization into BTC) appeals to institutional allocators rotating away from stablecoins; minimal competitive set but strong narrative tailwind.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CoinDesk Franklin Templeton dividend-to-Bitcoin ETF proposal; growing institutional appetite for BTC yield alternatives to staking

investment_theses.thesis: Long Micron Technology (MU) on DRAM/NAND supply tightness extending into late 2026; Apple margin compression and price increases indicate willingness to pay premium for allocation.
supporting_signals: CNBC Apple memory shortage, CEO Tim Cook 'unsustainable' statement signals structural undersupply
36Kr Anta folding shoe tech and AI companion robot launches both require advanced chip packaging; demand side remains robust
investment_theses.counter_view: Supply corrections (TSMC capacity ramp, new fabs) or recession demand destruction could collapse memory pricing faster than consensus expects; China's chip self-sufficiency drives substitution.
investment_theses.expression: Long MU calls (6-month) or spot MU equity; hedge with long puts to cap downside if Fed signals recession

investment_theses.thesis: Short leveraged crypto credit and DeFi tokens (monitor SIREN, REUSD, EIGEN liquidation cascades); digital credit selloff and forced rebalancing will pressure yield-farming and leverage-dependent protocols.
supporting_signals: CoinDesk 'Digital credit market hit by huge selloff as Strive CEO blames leverage liquidations'
Cointelegraph 'Smart-contract and DeFi coins lead losses as bitcoin wilts for 4th straight day'
CoinDesk Microsoft malware hijacking crypto wallets adds contagion risk to lending pools
investment_theses.counter_view: DeFi yields (USDC, UST forks on-chain) may stabilize quickly if volatility declines; Eigen staking protocol could see renewed institutional interest.
investment_theses.expression: Short DeFi-heavy ETF (DEFI index via perps on Hyperliquid); avoid shorting protocols with direct insurance or institutional backing (EIGEN, MakerDAO) unless liquidation cascade visible

investment_theses.thesis: Long DXY (US Dollar Index) on U.S.-Iran deal removing geopolitical premium from oil; falling energy costs reduce inflation surprise risk, supporting Fed hold bias through 2026.
supporting_signals: CNBC U.S.-Iran deal normalizes Strait of Hormuz, tanker traffic jumps; toll structure uncertainty delays repricing
BBC Israel-Hezbollah ceasefire agreement reduces Middle East risk premium
CoinDesk BTC weakness linked to macro tightening sentiment, but if inflation expectations fall, dollar softens slightly—thesis only works if Fed doesn't pivot
investment_theses.counter_view: Toll-free period ending and geopolitical re-escalation could re-ignite oil premium; Fed pivot on recession data could weaken USD faster than expected.
investment_theses.expression: Long DXY futures or UUP ETF; short crude oil (WTI or USO) as hedge; pair trade: long DXY / short EM FX (VXEME or EEM)

investment_theses.thesis: Long Polymarket / prediction market infrastructure plays (e.g., DYDX, UNI liquidity for binary options) on Schwab/Franklin Templeton / institutional adoption wave; prediction market TAM expanding from niche crypto to $100B+ in 2026–2027.
supporting_signals: CoinDesk + Cointelegraph: 'Charles Schwab to enter prediction markets with S&P 500 wagers'; signals institutional retail-facing infrastructure demand
36Kr China regulation signals readiness for RWA tokenization (Philippine SEC); global regulatory arbitrage opening
Kalshi, Polymarket mainstreaming through TradFi partnerships
investment_theses.counter_view: Regulatory crackdown on prediction markets (gambling classification, political speech concerns) could halt growth; Schwab's offering may cannibalize P2P volume rather than expand TAM.
investment_theses.expression: Long UNI or DYDX spot for order-book liquidity primitives; long PURSE or specialized prediction market yield (if applicable); avoid single-token correlation with Polymarket/Manifold unless they tokenize

investment_theses.thesis: Long SpaceX secondary equity (via CapTable, Forge, or similar) or short SpaceX leveraged ETFs on mean reversion; IPO surge (37% first week) will face institutional rebalancing and profit-taking by Q3 2026.
supporting_signals: CNBC SpaceX IPO debut minted trillionaire Musk stake, triggered historic leveraged ETF demand (signal of retail euphoria, not fundamental upside)
CNBC notes 'riskiest SpaceX stock trade' in leveraged ETFs—classic indicator of meme-driven froth at IPO launch
investment_theses.counter_view: SpaceX fundamentals (Starlink revenue ramp, government contracts under Trump, Mars mission narrative) could support $1T+ valuation long-term; short thesis assumes sentiment reversal without catalyst.
